info.name: Red Rocket Pizza
info.description: A vibrant blend of crushed Italian tomatoes, creamy mozzarella, cheddar, sun-dried tomatoes, and black olives, crowned with fresh rocket

info.name: Veg Out Pizza
info.description: A loaded pizza made with crushed Italian tomatoes, mozzarella, cheddar, and a hearty array of broccoli, spinach, mushrooms, bell peppers, sun-dried tomatoes, olives, red onion, and basil

info.name: Margherita Pizza
info.description: A delicious classic- crushed Italian tomatoes and melting mozzarella on a fresh base, elevated by Parmesan and fresh basil

info.name: Pepperoni Pizza
info.description: Treat yourself to our classic pepperoni pizza, smothered in tangy crushed tomato sauce, spicy Pork pepperoni, gooey mozzarella, all seasoned with fragrant oregano

info.name: Funghi Pizza
info.description: Dive into the earthy embrace of roasted mushrooms, enhanced by a creamy mushroom sauce and smoked mozzarella, with pickled red onions, all garnished with fresh mint parsley and parmesan on a fresh pizza base

info.name: Pesto Besto Pizza
info.description: Aromatic fresh basil pesto, rich mozzarella, sweet cherry tomatoes, courgettes, earthy mushrooms, caramelized onions, Parmesan, and basil on a fresh base

info.name: Chilli Freak Pizza
info.description: Ignite your taste buds with this pizza, featuring a daring chilli-freak sauce, a perfect melt of mozzarella and Cheddar, and an explosive assortment of traffic-light chillies and jalape

info.name: Chicken Chilli Freak Pizza
info.description: Embark on a fiery journey with our chilli-freak sauce pizza, a bold blend of mozzarella and Cheddar, tender pulled chicken, a vibrant mix of traffic-light chillies and jalapeños, all finished with a refreshing drizzle of minty yoghurt and a zest of lime

info.name: Paneer Kadhai Pizza
info.description: This flavourful pizza is adorned with chilli-freak sauce, spicy marinated paneer, stretchy mozzarella, smoky charred peppers., red onions and fresh coriander

info.name: Shrimply Hot Pizza
info.description: Dive into spicy chilli-freak sauce, succulent prawns, mozzarella, and fennel, balanced with fresh chilli and cool yoghurt drizzle

info.name: Chicken Parm
info.description: Crispy chicken breast with herby tomato sauce and mozzarella, garnished with fresh rocket & Basil

info.name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
info.description: Freshly baked, hand-stretched bread topped with gooey Mozzarella, accompanied by a sun-dried tomato and olive tapenade dip

info.name: Fish Fingers
info.description: Crispy fish fingers served with a chunky tartare sauce and a side salad

info.name: Tomato Bruschetta
info.description: Enjoy toasted Ciabatta topped with slow-roasted cherry tomatoes, basil, garlic, and whipped ricotta

info.name: Crispy Fried Seafood
info.description: A delightful mix of golden-fried fish, squid, prawns, and sweet potato, seasoned with a chilli and fennel rub, paired with garlic mayo for dipping

info.name: Great Greens
info.description: Seasonal green veggies sauteed with chilli, garlic, and butter

info.name: Fiery Fries
info.description: Fries tossed in a fennel rub, crispy garlic, and chilli for a spicy, aromatic kick

info.name: Red Rocket Pizza
info.description: A vibrant blend of crushed Italian tomatoes, creamy mozzarella, cheddar, sun-dried tomatoes, and black olives, crowned with fresh rocket

info.name: Veg Out Pizza
info.description: A loaded pizza made with crushed Italian tomatoes, mozzarella, cheddar, and a hearty array of broccoli, spinach, mushrooms, bell peppers, sun-dried tomatoes, olives, red onion, and basil

info.name: Margherita Pizza
info.description: A delicious classic- crushed Italian tomatoes and melting mozzarella on a fresh base, elevated by Parmesan and fresh basil

info.name: Pepperoni Pizza
info.description: Treat yourself to our classic pepperoni pizza, smothered in tangy crushed tomato sauce, spicy Pork pepperoni, gooey mozzarella, all seasoned with fragrant oregano

info.name: Funghi Pizza
info.description: Dive into the earthy embrace of roasted mushrooms, enhanced by a creamy mushroom sauce and smoked mozzarella, with pickled red onions, all garnished with fresh mint parsley and parmesan on a fresh pizza base

info.name: Pesto Besto Pizza
info.description: Aromatic fresh basil pesto, rich mozzarella, sweet cherry tomatoes, courgettes, earthy mushrooms, caramelized onions, Parmesan, and basil on a fresh base

info.name: Chilli Lamb Pizza
info.description: Featuring a perfectly baked pizza dough topped with tangy pizza sauce, melted mozzarella, and succulent lamb meatballs. Enhanced with fresh rocket, pickled red onions, red chili, and a sprinkle of vegetarian Parmesan, finished with a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

info.name: Goat Cheese & Onion Pizza
info.description: This pizza features a unique blend of creamy goat cheese, roasted onion petals, green bell peppers, and a white sauce base, topped with rocket and hot honey.

info.name: Chilli Freak Pizza
info.description: Ignite your taste buds with this pizza, featuring a daring chilli-freak sauce, a perfect melt of mozzarella and Cheddar, and an explosive assortment of traffic-light chillies and jalape

info.name: Chicken Chilli Freak Pizza
info.description: Embark on a fiery journey with our chilli-freak sauce pizza, a bold blend of mozzarella and Cheddar, tender pulled chicken, a vibrant mix of traffic-light chillies and jalapeños, all finished with a refreshing drizzle of minty yoghurt and a zest of lime

info.name: Paneer Kadhai Pizza
info.description: This flavourful pizza is adorned with chilli-freak sauce, spicy marinated paneer, stretchy mozzarella, smoky charred peppers., red onions and fresh coriander

info.name: Shrimply Hot Pizza
info.description: Dive into spicy chilli-freak sauce, succulent prawns, mozzarella, and fennel, balanced with fresh chilli and cool yoghurt drizzle

info.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
info.description: Perfectly baked pizza dough topped with spicy and tangy BBQ sauce, tender pulled chicken, and melted mozzarella. Garnished with red onion pickled in red wine vinegar, fresh coriander leaves, and a drizzle of jalapeño dressing.

info.name: Cilantro Chicken Pizza
info.description: Crisp pizza dough base topped with zesty coriander pesto, melted mozzarella, and sharp English cheddar. Layered with pulled chicken,  bell peppers, and onion petals, and sprinkled with cumin powder and mixed chilies. Finished with fresh coriander leaves and a splash of lemon juice.

info.name: Crispy Potato Burger
info.description: A crispy potato patty nestled in a soft burger bun with a layer of veg burger sauce. Topped with fresh iceberg lettuce, juicy tomato slices, pickled red onion. Served with a side of French fries.

info.name: Fresh Caprese Sarnie
info.description: Pizza dough filled with classic Caprese salad ingredients such as tomatoes, mozzarella, basil, and pesto. Served with dressed rocket and radicchio, topped with grated Parmesan and a drizzle of balsamic reduction.

info.name: Fried Chicken Burger
info.description: A crispy potato patty nestled in a soft burger bun with a layer of veg burger sauce. Topped with fresh iceberg lettuce, juicy tomato slices, pickled red onion. Served with a side of French fries.

info.name: Meatball Sarnie
info.description: Featuring juicy meatballs simmered in a rich tomato and basil sauce. Encased in freshly baked pizza dough with melted mozzarella, this hearty sandwich is topped with Parmesan and served alongside a refreshing salad of rocket and radicchio, drizzled with extra virgin olive oil and balsamic reduction.

info.name: Green Pasta Bake
info.description: Penne with cheese sauce, courgettes, peas, spinach, ricotta, mint, and fresh pesto

info.name: Flamin Pasta Bake
info.description: Penne baked in a spicy herby tomato sauce with veggies, mozzarella, Parmesan, and basil

info.name: Spaghetti & Meatballs
info.description: Spaghetti tossed in a rich harissa tomato sauce, and topped with succulent lamb meatballs. Garnished with freshly grated Parmesan and chopped parsley, this dish is a harmonious blend of flavours, perfect for any pasta lover.

info.name: Spicy Chicken Pasta
info.description: Fusilli tossed in a fiery cacciatore sauce with tomatoes, mushrooms, and black olives. Topped with juicy pulled chicken, aged Parmesan, crispy rosemary, and a sprinkle of chili flakes.

info.name: Spicy Prawn Pasta
info.description: Fusilli tossed in a fiery chilli freak sauce with fresh prawns. Garnished with red chillies and cilantro.

info.name: Chicken Parm
info.description: Crispy chicken breast with herby tomato sauce and mozzarella, garnished with fresh rocket & Basil

info.name: Crispy Spiced Cottage Cheese
info.description: Featuring crispy paneer served with fresh rocket leaves dressed in extra virgin olive oil and a spice mix. Complemented with rich tomato passata and a rocket salad.

info.name: Fish Ratatouille
info.description: Tender white fish, perfectly seasoned and nestled atop a bed of vibrant, chargrilled vegetables. Enhanced with zesty arrabbiata and aromatic basil pesto, this dish is paired with freshly baked flatbread brushed with pesto.

info.name: Spicy Chicken Pizzaiola
info.description: Succulent baked chicken in a rich arrabbiata sauce with sliced red chili. Topped with melted mozzarella and fresh parsley, served with garlic-butter brushed pizza dough wedges for a perfect balance of heat and savoury.

info.name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
info.description: Freshly baked, hand-stretched bread topped with gooey Mozzarella, accompanied by a sun-dried tomato and olive tapenade dip

info.name: Kickin Chicken - Chilli Freak
info.description: Savour the zest with crispy fried chicken wings in a chilli-freak glaze, served with a cooling mint and lemon yoghurt dip

info.name: Fish Fingers
info.description: Crispy fish fingers served with a chunky tartare sauce and a side salad

info.name: Tomato Bruschetta
info.description: Enjoy toasted Ciabatta topped with slow-roasted cherry tomatoes, basil, garlic, and whipped ricotta

info.name: Crispy Fried Seafood
info.description: A delightful mix of golden-fried fish, squid, prawns, and sweet potato, seasoned with a chilli and fennel rub, paired with garlic mayo for dipping

info.name: Kickin Chicken - BBQ
info.description: Brined and seasoned chicken wings, deep-fried to perfection and coated in tangy BBQ or spicy chilli freak sauce. Garnished with red chilli, served with a wedge of lemon, and accompanied by a side of refreshing mint yoghurt.

info.name: Chicken Croquettes
info.description: Perfectly seasoned chicken croquettes served with a side of tangy sriracha mayo. Garnished with a sprinkle of vegetarian Parmesan.

info.name: Mini Keema Calzone
info.description: This delectable dish features a perfectly baked mini calzone, stuffed with rich tomato sauce, spiced lamb ragu, and crumbled feta. Served with a refreshing coriander yoghurt dipping sauce.

info.name: Pasta Chips
info.description: Golden fried fusilli pasta, tossed in a spicy garlic rub, and served with a zesty arrabbiata dipping sauce. Garnished with veggie Parmesan for an extra burst of flavour.

info.name: Watermelon & Feta
info.description: A refreshing salad with juicy watermelon and creamy feta, accented with red onion, mint, and a zesty lime dressing

info.name: Greek Market
info.description: Enjoy fresh romaine & radicchio lettuce mixed with chilli-spiked feta, cucumber, tomato, red pepper, olives, and onion, all dressed in house-made honey-mustard, served with pizza-dough flatbread

info.name: Jamie's Caesar
info.description: Bite into our crunchy Caesar Salad, a fresh blend of crisp lettuce, broccoli, red onion, all tossed in a garlicky yoghurt dressing with crunchy croutons.

info.name: Queen Quinoa
info.description: A vibrant blend of quinoa, roasted carrots and beets, fennel, and orange segments. Tossed with mint leaves, sherry vinegar, extra virgin olive oil, and topped with feta cheese, pomegranate seeds, and mixed seeds.

info.name: Great Greens
info.description: Seasonal green veggies sauteed with chilli, garlic, and butter

info.name: Fiery Fries
info.description: Fries tossed in a fennel rub, crispy garlic, and chilli for a spicy, aromatic kick

info.name: Burrata & Tomato
info.description: Delicate, creamy Italian burrata, perfectly paired with chopped heritage tomatoes, fresh basil, and a hint of extra virgin olive oil. Served on a bed of basil pesto.

info.name: Nyc-style Cheesecake
info.description: Creamy baked vanilla cheesecake paired with a sweet strawberry compote and a hint of mint for a refreshing twist on a New York favourite

info.name: Tiramisu
info.description: A classic Italian dessert layering sponge soaked in coffee syrup with rich mascarpone cream. A delightful blend of coffee and creamy textures

info.name: Signature Non Veg Combo 1
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Non‑Veg Pizzas – Pepperoni & BBQ Chicken, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Non Veg Combo 2
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Non‑Veg Pizzas – Cilantro Chicken & Chicken Chilli Freak, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Non Veg Combo 3
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Non‑Veg Pizzas – BBQ Chicken & Chicken Chilli Freak, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg & Non Veg Combo 1
info.description: Includes 1 Medium (7") Cilantro Chicken Pizza and 1 Medium (7") Paneer Kadhai Pizza, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg & Non Veg Combo 2
info.description: Includes 1 Medium (7") Shrimply Hot Pizza and 1 Medium (7") Veg Out Pizza, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg Combo 1
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Veg Pizzas – Red Rocket & Pesto Besto, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg Combo 2
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Veg Pizzas – Margherita & Veg Out, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg Combo 3
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Veg Pizzas – Chilli Freak & Goat's Cheese & Onion, served with 2 Coke Cans.

info.name: Signature Veg Combo 4
info.description: Includes 2 Medium (7") Veg Pizzas – Funghi & Veg Out, served with 2 Coke Cans.
